name: Regional API GetNet
description:
Welcome to GetNet. This API enables your company to integrate with the GetNet Regional API and leverage top-tier payment solutions. GetNet provides secure and efficient services for processing e-commerce transactions, allowing merchants to accept credit, debit, and bank cards seamlessly in their virtual stores. In addition to payment processing, GetNet offers safe, recurring, anti-fraud, conciliator services and other features designed to support your business with speed and security.

**Overview (What You’ll Find in This Documentation)**
This section provides an overview of the Regional API’s key functionalities. It covers authentication methods, base URL configuration, and available endpoints for processing payments, managing subscriptions, handling installments, and performing card operations. Additionally, it details transaction queries, post-sale processes such as cancellations and refunds, and 3D Secure authentication. Use this documentation to understand the structure and behavior of each API request and response.
